title: Wind-Tunnel Multi-Regime Drag Law — extrapolating symbolic regression
strategies: constant baseline: predict the mean training Cd (ignores Re structure) -> ~0.1
log-linear fit Cd ~ 1 + log(Re): captures the mid-Re downward trend but extrapolates the wrong asymptote at high Re
structured physical basis [1, 1/Re, 1/sqrt(Re)] fit by least squares: recovers the viscous + boundary-layer + plateau shape and extrapolates the correct decay
alternatives: add a roughness (eps) term, model the high-Re drag-crisis drop with a tanh/rational transition, or trade complexity penalty against held-out error
